en: What do you know? I know everything. Was it a code red?
ko: 당신은 무엇을 알고 있나요? 저는 모든 것을 압니다.

en: Yes. Did Kendrick give the order? Yes. Did you witness it?
I didn't need to. Did you witness it? No. Then how do you know? I know.
ko: 당신은 그것을 목격했나요? 필요 없었습니다. 당신은 목격했나요? 아니요.

en: Yeah, you know shit. He was never going to be transferred off that base.
ko: 그는 절대 그 기지에서 전출되지 않을 것입니다.

en: Jessup was going to keep him on the base. He said he wanted him trained.
You've got the transfer order. It's got your signature. Yeah, I know.
ko: 당신은 전출 명령서를 가지고 있습니다. 당신의 서명이 있습니다. 네, 압니다.

en: I signed it the morning you arrived in Cuba, five days after Santiago died.
ko: 저는 당신이 쿠바에 도착한 아침에 서명했습니다. 산티아고가 죽은 지 5일 후입니다.

en: I'm going to get you a deal, some kind of immunity with the prosecutor.
ko: 당신에게 거래를 만들어 줄게요. 검사와 면책을 받을 수 있는 어떤 것입니다.

en: In about four days, you're going to appear as a witness of defense, and you're going
ko: 약 4일 후에 당신은 변호 측 증인으로 출석할 것입니다.

en: to tell the court exactly what you told me.
ko: 그리고 당신은 법원에 저에게 말한 그대로 이야기할 것입니다.

en: So right now, I'm going to check you into a motel, and we are going to start from the I don't want a deal.
I want you to know that I'm proud neither of what I have done nor of what I am doing.
ko: 제가 한 일에도 자랑스럽지 않다는 것을 알아주세요.

en: Where is he? The downtown lodge in northeast. I want him guarded.
